compiled_state.title: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with planning.external_dependency_block_enabled
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Add an entry for planning.external_dependency_block_enabled to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md following the design.figma_collaboration table-row pattern.

## Entry to Add (table format)
| Key | Description | Accepted values | Default | Used by |
| planning.external_dependency_block_enabled | When true, skills emit an External Dependencies block and pause for user confirmation on manual-step dependencies | true / false | false | brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, sprint |

Place in a 'Planning' section (create if absent) near the 'Design' section.

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: GREEN, Rule 5 exemption — static doc file)
Structural boundary test only. No RED test required.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: grep -q 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- Verify: grep -q 'true / false' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- Verify: grep -q 'Planning' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (section header present)
